Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.Personal.Course.PageSetup.CourseParticipantPermissions

Permissions for the course participant page

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
HasManageParticipantsAndGroupsPermission

Indicates whether the current user has permission to manage members and groups in the course

 boolean

None.
HasGeneralAdministrationPermission

Indicates whether the current user has general administration permission in the course

 boolean

None.
CanViewDetailedInformation

Reflects the "Can view detailed information" setting

 boolean

None.
